focus: Fix classic browser AI import repair ReferenceError: addAiSourceIdsToSourceSlides is not defined
rootCause: js/file-io-stage24c.js referenced patch-based AI source-id helpers that were present in the ESM file but missing from the classic script path loaded by index.html.
changes: Added deterministicAiSourceBlockId and addAiSourceIdsToSourceSlides to js/file-io-stage24c.js.
Added classic helper functions for source-block mapping, image-asset preservation, simple math-container repair, and source merge fallback.
Aligned the classic AI import user prompt with patch-based repair and stable __aiSourceBlockId/blockId patch targeting.
Updated ESM prompt/stage strings for consistency and added Stage 42I diagnostic aliases while preserving Stage 42H aliases.
checksRun: VM smoke test: fake /api/lumina/ai patch response applied to source slide with __aiSourceBlockId and math repair x imes y -> \[x \times y\]
expectedRuntimeBehavior: Import review modal appears as before.
Continue import loads source-extracted slides immediately.
AI repair no longer throws Can't find variable: addAiSourceIdsToSourceSlides in the classic path.
If AI returns valid patches, the app reports patch changes; if no changes are needed, the source-extracted slides remain loaded with a clear notice.
